content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials exist (demo_user.txt/demo_password.txt) but notes.txt just says "n/a", with no explanation of how to reach the subscription paywall or blocking/schedule features behind login.
Pierre: Apple reviewers need explicit steps to exercise gated features like the StoreKit paywall in PaywallView.swift, not just a login/password pair. "n/a" in notes.txt gives no guidance on navigating to Premium features, schedules, or reports, which risks a rejection for insufficient information under 2.1. Please replace notes.txt with concrete steps (e.g., "Sign in with provided credentials, then tap Premium tab to view paywall; subscription is sandboxed").
